notes: Shell perf gate only. Win7/4GB/HDD reference-VM numbers are re-captured in A15 (perf-harden). See docs/adr/0009-a5-billing-shell.md.

focusNeverLostToMouse.test: F4 is a no-op when no lines are present — focus never lost to mouse

a11yLandmarksPresent.test: a11y: billing region, customer listbox, Save button accessible name + shortcut

keyboardOnlyPath.test: keyboard-only path: add line via typing + Enter, then F10 saves — no mouse
